message:
feat(web): experience-level aware progressive disclosure in HelpOverlay

- Filter shortcuts by user's experience level (novice/intermediate/power)
- Default to 'essential' mode for novice users, 'detailed' for others
- Auto-promote to intermediate when user explores advanced shortcuts
- Add badges to indicate shortcut experience level requirements
- Show user's experience level in toolbar

Closes phage_explorer-s4qx.1.8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
